    Class

    enum 
    PruningState
    Defines the possible pruning and pinning states for messages and parts within the conversation context.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    History.setMessagePruningState(List<Long> messageIds, PruningState newState)
    Updates the pruning policy for all parts of one or more messages.
    String
    History.setPartPruningState(List<Long> partIds, PruningState newState)
    Updates the pruning policy for specific message parts.
